tasks.label: backend-clean-ports
tasks.command: pkill -f 'cmd/(auth-svc|profile-svc|matching-svc|chat-svc|mobile-bff|api-gateway)' || true; pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:8080 -ti tcp:8081 -ti tcp:9091 -ti tcp:9092 -ti tcp:9093 -ti tcp:9094 -ti tcp:10091 -ti tcp:10092 -ti tcp:10093 -ti tcp:10094); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill -9 $pids; fi; echo CLEAN_DONE

tasks.label: backend-kill-listeners
tasks.command: lsof -ti tcp:8080,tcp:8081,tcp:9091,tcp:9092,tcp:9093,tcp:9094,tcp:10091,tcp:10092,tcp:10093,tcp:10094 | xargs -r kill -9; pkill -f 'cmd/auth-svc|cmd/profile-svc|cmd/matching-svc|cmd/chat-svc|cmd/mobile-bff|cmd/api-gateway' || true; echo KILLED
